title: SemanticVersion
description: Semantic Versioning 2.0.0 version string and components following the MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH format

version.description: Full version string in MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH[-pre-release][+build] format

major.description: Major version number. Incremented for incompatible API changes.

minor.description: Minor version number. Incremented for backward-compatible new functionality.

patch.description: Patch version number. Incremented for backward-compatible bug fixes.

isBreaking.description: Whether this version contains breaking changes (major version bump)

isFeature.description: Whether this version adds new backward-compatible features (minor version bump)

isBugFix.description: Whether this version is a backward-compatible bug fix only (patch version bump)
